added: Specter Module: v2.0 Release — full standalone VTuber rigging engine
Specter Module: Custom .specter ZIP format (manifest + model + textures)
Specter Module: 8-mode Editor (Mesh, Bones, Weights, Physics, Preview, Live)
Specter Module: AI-assisted mesh topology and vertex weight prediction
Specter Module: WebGL rendering via PIXI.js v7 with CPU-side Linear Blend Skinning
Specter Module: Spring physics bone chain simulation for hair and accessories
Specter Module: Integrated Documentation and Tutorial pages (/docs, /tutorial)
Synapse Module: AI-powered motion tracking bridge (initial release)
Synapse Module: High-precision Face Tracking via modern MediaPipe Tasks API
Synapse Module: Face Blendshapes integration for accurate eye/mouth sync
Synapse Module: Support for dual optical capture (Webcam and Monitor)
Synapse Module: Live raw preview mode with persistent MJPEG fallback streaming
Synapse Module: Centralized CaptureManager to manage hardware mutex
Port Manager: Universal dynamic port allocation and registration system
Port Manager: Self-healing registry with automatic stale port detection
Port Manager: Diagnostics dashboard for live socket and registry visualization
Sidebar: Integrated Aethvion Modules (Specter/Synapse) with dynamic launch support
Word Search: AI Puzzle mode — generate themed grids from any topic via ProviderManager
Word Search: Topic input field and AI Puzzle button in the game toolbar
Word Search: Topic badge displayed in the word list sidebar during AI-generated puzzles
Word Search: Grid shimmer loading animation while AI generates a word list
improved: Specter Module: Decoupled architecture for full standalone operation
Specter Module: Enhanced v1 → v2 model auto-migration on load
Files Dashboard: Intelligent backend caching and immediate UI responsiveness
Word Search: generatePuzzle() now accepts a custom word list parameter for AI and future expansion
Word Search: Input validation with shake animation when AI topic is empty
changed: Specter Module: Replaced directory-based storage with single-file .specter archives
System: Migrated tracking and module services to dynamic negotiated port range

added: Nexus Module: Full bidirectional Discord messaging bridge
Nexus Module: Discord Worker settings panel with User Binding control
Nexus Module: Remote tool output (Screenshots and files delivered to DMs)
System: Automated startup update check against remote registry
improved: Memory: Unified context persistence for histories and personas cross-platform
changed: Nexus Module: Security lockdown (DMs restricted to verified Main User)
upgraded: Orchestrator: Master Orchestrator with native Persona loops and memory synthesis

added: Version: Local version highlighting and system status cards
improved: Version: Enhanced Version Tab with grouped changelogs and history visibility

added: Chat: Instant Thread Creation and automated conversation titling
Games: Token Savers (Manual start overlays for Logic Quest & Blackjack)
System: Initial detailed changelog and release tracking implementation
improved: System: Optimized installation dependencies (Migrated to winrt-runtime)
changed: Version: Refactored Version Tab into bottom-pinned sidebar navigation

modes.name: Arena Battle Mode
modes.desc: Pit multiple LLMs against each other to compare logic and speed.

modes.name: AI Conversations
modes.desc: Assign personas to multiple models and watch them interact autonomously about the starting prompt.

tooling.name: Dynamic Tool Forge
tooling.desc: Create, test, and deploy custom tools for AI models on the fly.

tooling.name: Python Package Manager
tooling.desc: Install and manage dependencies directly from the dashboard.

tooling.name: Environment (.env) Manager
tooling.desc: Securely handle API keys and system variables without leaving the UI.

telemetry.name: Live Token & Cost Tracking
telemetry.desc: Real-time usage analytics and estimated cost calculation per provider.

telemetry.name: Hardware Vitals Monitoring
telemetry.desc: Local telemetry for CPU, RAM, and system resource usage.

security.name: Intelligence Firewall
security.desc: Configurable safety filters and system-level prompt overrides.

security.name: Trace IDs
security.desc: Unique identifiers for auditing and tracking multi-step LLM reasoning.

interface.name: Web Dashboard
interface.desc: A clean, responsive UI for managing all aspects of the Misaka node.

interface.name: Intelligent Chat Interface
interface.desc: Instant thread creation with seamless auto-titling and persistent layout memory across modes.

interface.name: Discord Bridge Integrations
interface.desc: Full two-way communication with Discord servers and secured direct-messaging tools.

assistant.name: Misaka Cipher asistant window
assistant.desc: Can help you with your tasks and understanding Misaka Cipher and its features.

memory.name: Conversation - Evolving Context
memory.desc: Dynamic memory system that extracts facts, traits, and context to reduce token bloat while maintaining long-term persona growth across platforms.

modes.name: Autonomous Agents
modes.desc: Goal-oriented agents capable of multi-step planning and file manipulation.

research.name: Advanced AI Conversations
research.desc: Advanced sandbox to study how AI traits shift through prolonged interaction, each person you add has its own traits, personality and memory which will change over time depending on the conversation partners and topics.

providers.name: OpenRouter
providers.desc: Universal adapter to access hundreds of models with a single key.

infrastructure.name: Local Model Support (Ollama)
infrastructure.desc: Run uncensored, open-source models completely offline.

infrastructure.name: vLLM Integration
infrastructure.desc: High-throughput serving for local large language models.

infrastructure.name: Vector DB / RAG
infrastructure.desc: Drop-in document processing and semantic search capabilities.

interface.name: Native Voice Interaction
interface.desc: Speech-to-text and text-to-speech for hands-free operation.

interface.name: Dark/Light Theme Engine
interface.desc: Customizable UI themes beyond the default styling.

modules.name: Nexus Module
modules.desc: The central bridge between Misaka and external hardware/software.

features.name: Media Sentinel (SMTC)
features.desc: Real-time detection of system-wide media playback (Spotify, YouTube, etc.).

features.name: Spotify Integration
features.desc: OAuth2 powered link to play, pause, and control your Spotify account.

features.name: Discord Bridge Integration
features.desc: Bi-directional bot integration supporting full sentient text chat, token persistence, and image uploads in servers and DMs.

wip.name: Local File Indexing
wip.desc: Scanning of specific directories to allow Misaka to understand your local file structure better.

planned.name: Home Automation Link
planned.desc: Integration with Home Assistant / Philips Hue for physical environmental control.

planned.name: System Task Scheduler
planned.desc: Allow Misaka to schedule tasks like system updates or backups.

modules.name: Specter Module
modules.desc: Standalone VTuber engine — rig, animate, and generate 2D avatar models with AI assistance.

features.name: VTuber Rigging Editor
features.desc: 8-mode editor for mesh, bone, weight, physics, and preview workflows.

features.name: .specter File Format
features.desc: Custom ZIP-based model format containing manifest, full model data, and embedded textures.

features.name: AI-Assisted Rigging
features.desc: Auto-generate mesh topology, bone hierarchies, and vertex weights with AI assistance.

features.name: Linear Blend Skinning
features.desc: CPU-side LBS deformation rendered via PIXI.js v7 SimpleMesh for smooth real-time animation.

features.name: Spring Physics
features.desc: Per-bone spring chain simulation for hair and accessories.

features.name: Documentation & Tutorial
features.desc: Built-in technical reference (/docs) and beginner tutorial (/tutorial) viewable alongside the editor.

wip.name: Face Tracking Integration
wip.desc: Live tracking via bridge interface — supports MediaPipe, OpenSeeFace, and VTube Studio backends.

planned.name: AI Character Generation
planned.desc: Generate full VTuber character sheets and auto-rig them end-to-end.

planned.name: Local SD Pipeline
planned.desc: Stable Diffusion integration for local character generation without cloud providers.

modules.name: Synapse Module
modules.desc: Universal tracking bridge for optical and data-driven motion capture.

features.name: MediaPipe AI Tracking
features.desc: Modern FaceLandmarker implementation using blendshapes for high-precision facial capture.

features.name: Dual Input Capture
features.desc: Switch effortlessly between webcam feeds and desktop monitor regions.

features.name: Raw Preview Mode
features.desc: Verify tracking alignment with real-time MJPEG fallback streaming.

features.name: CaptureManager Shared Access
features.desc: Centralized hardware mutex preventing camera and screen capture conflicts.

wip.name: OpenSeeFace Support
wip.desc: Implementing backend for desktop-based tracking via local process bridge.

wip.name: VTube Studio API Link
wip.desc: Forwarding tracking data directly to VTube Studio models via websocket.

planned.name: Body & Pose Tracking
planned.desc: Expanding optical engine to support full-body bone rigging via MediaPipe Pose.

planned.name: Hand & Finger Data
planned.desc: Gesture-based control and animation using MediaPipe Hand landmarks.
